markdown:
# Scimitar of Speed

- **Type**: M|XPHB
- **Weight**: 3 lb.
- **Damage**: 1d6 S
- **Properties**: F|XPHB, L|XPHB

You gain a +2 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. In addition, you can make one attack with it as a [[bonus_action Action]] on each of your turns.
